content.text: [Sub Agent] Mission: backend architecture review for Lucky5 vNext planning. Workspace root is current repo. Inspect these exact areas: server/src/Lucky5.Api/Controllers/GameController.cs, server/src/Lucky5.Api/Controllers/AuthController.cs, server/src/Lucky5.Api/Controllers/AdminController.cs; server/src/Lucky5.Application contracts/DTOs/requests; server/src/Lucky5.Domain entities related to users, rounds, machine ledger/session; server/src/Lucky5.Infrastructure services and InMemoryDataStore.cs. Deliver a tight, actionable branch report with sections: Current Persistence Model, Admin Capabilities, Session/Ledger Model, Pain Points, vNext Priorities, and exact file references with line numbers where possible. Focus on backend architecture and persistence/session implications for vNext.
